recommendations.title: The Windermere Children
recommendations.overview: The story of the pioneering project to rehabilitate child survivors of the Holocaust on the shores of Lake Windermere.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: And Their Children After Them
recommendations.overview: In eastern France, two teenage cousins have the summer of their lives when they paddle a purloined canoe to the far shore of a lake.

recommendations.title: With a Friend Like Harry...
recommendations.overview: While fixing up their summer cottage, Michel and his family run into a man who claims to have gone to high school with Michel.

recommendations.title: Call Me by Your Name
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 1983, a 17-year-old Elio spends his days in his family's villa in Italy. One day Oliver, a graduate student, arrives to assist Elio's father, a professor of Greco-Roman culture. Soon, Elio and Oliver discover a summer that will alter

recommendations.title: My Rainy Days
recommendations.overview: Because of her past, 17-year-old Rio lives her days filling the emptiness in her heart with money—until one day, she meets a university professor named Kouki and falls in love.

recommendations.title: The Watchmaker of St. Paul
recommendations.overview: Lyons, France. Michel Descombes is a watchmaker who lives alone with his teenage son Bernard. When the police visit and informs him that Bernard killed a man and is on the run with a girl, Michel realizes that he knew far less about his son than he t

recommendations.title: The Lake
recommendations.overview: A little girl brings back the big egg she finds by a nearby lake to her home. However, the egg belongs to a mysterious and dangerous creature, and it soon starts searching for it.

recommendations.title: A Day in the Country
recommendations.overview: The family of a Parisian shop-owner spends a day in the country. The daughter falls in love with a man at the inn, where they spend the day.
